description_long: This is a large, freestanding black cabinet with a two-part structure: an upper display section and a lower storage section. The upper section features three glass-fronted sliding doors, each with brass handles, allowing visibility and access to the interior shelves. The lower section consists of two solid doors on either side and a central column of four drawers, all with matching brass handles. The cabinet is constructed with clean, straight lines and a slightly protruding cornice at the top, giving it a classic, formal appearance. The finish is smooth and glossy, with a uniform black color and metallic accents. The overall build suggests it is made primarily of wood, with glass panels and metal hardware.
description: A large, glossy black cabinet with glass sliding doors on top and solid doors and drawers below, accented by brass handles. The design is classic and formal, with a smooth finish and visible glass panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing three glass sliding doors on the upper section, two solid doors, and four central drawers with brass handles on the lower section.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's depth, stepped profile, and the protruding cornice at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, featureless black back panel with no visible openings or hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the depth and stepped profile seen in view 1.
